name: Gondola Pizza
notepad:
1992 Gas pack(5-ton) tied into the same ductwork as the new 2021 AC only package(4-ton) and controlled by one thermostat in the dining area.


I recommend that we remove the busted 5-ton completely. Route existing ductwork to cool the kitchen/bar only with the 4-ton AC.


In the dining, install a split 5-ton system(maybe more) above the drop ceiling. There is plenty of room. Nine existing 8" flex supplies. Route two new supplies with existing flex over to the other small dining area.


IMPORTANT: install make-up air in the kitchen. They have a double exhaust hood, but no makeup air.


Dining is 1,400sq' with a maximum seating capacity of 90 if every booth is FULL. There is room for two systems in the attic if necessary. Will need 2x6s and hanging materials.
